hooks.command: python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/dev/scripts/devctl.py" remote-control hook --provider claude --entrypoint claude_builtin_remote_control --launcher-source claude_builtin_slash --hook-poll-seconds 45 --format json >> /tmp/codex-voice-remote-control-hook.log 2>&1

python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/dev/scripts/devctl.py" remote-control hook --provider claude --entrypoint claude_builtin_remote_control --launcher-source claude_builtin_slash --hook-poll-seconds 45 --format json >> /tmp/codex-voice-remote-control-hook.log 2>&1

python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/dev/scripts/devctl.py" remote-control hook --provider claude --entrypoint claude_builtin_remote_control --launcher-source claude_builtin_slash --hook-poll-seconds 45 --format json >> /tmp/codex-voice-remote-control-hook.log 2>&1

python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/dev/scripts/devctl.py" remote-control exit --provider claude --entrypoint claude_session_end --launcher-source claude_session_end --format json >> /tmp/codex-voice-remote-control-hook.log 2>&1
